subcodes.first_line: O thou respected youth. How many the honourable souls in past centuries and times who yearned with all their hearts
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نوجوان محترم چه قدر نفوس بزرگوار در قرون های ماضیه نهایت آرزو داشتند که
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @prophecy and fulfillment, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
